summary: See clues file for full details. 6 tossups, 1 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 6 tossups and 1 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: This artist's love of drawing Punchinellos in everyday scenarios was mimicked by his son for a series of 104 pen-and-ink drawings of a Punchinello's life.
examples: This artist's love of drawing Punchinellos in everyday scenarios was mimicked by his son for a series of 104 pen-and-ink drawings of a Punchinello's life.

clues.clue: One of this artist's many collaborations with quadratura  specialist Girolamo Mengozzi-Colonna was a di sotto in su  depiction of Bellerophon  for the Palazzo Labia .
examples: One of this artist's many collaborations with quadratura  specialist Girolamo Mengozzi-Colonna was a di sotto in su  depiction of Bellerophon  for the Palazzo Labia .

clues.clue: This artist painted Hercules alongside a column symbolizing Gibraltar for the Royal Palace in (*) Madrid, where he worked for Charles III.
examples: This artist painted Hercules alongside a column symbolizing Gibraltar for the Royal Palace in (*) Madrid, where he worked for Charles III.

clues.clue: This artist of The Apotheosis of the Spanish Monarchy depicted Frederick Barbarossa's marriage in the Kaisersaal  of a building designed by Balthasar Neumann .
examples: This artist of The Apotheosis of the Spanish Monarchy depicted Frederick Barbarossa's marriage in the Kaisersaal  of a building designed by Balthasar Neumann .

clues.clue: This artist painted the world's largest ceiling fresco, which depicts personifications of Africa, America, Asia, and Europe.
examples: This artist painted the world's largest ceiling fresco, which depicts personifications of Africa, America, Asia, and Europe.

clues.clue: A book on this artist opens by analyzing how one of his paintings was cut into Landscape with Halberdier and The Finding of Moses.
examples: A book on this artist opens by analyzing how one of his paintings was cut into Landscape with Halberdier and The Finding of Moses.

clues.clue: Svetlana Alpers and Michael Baxandall collaborated on that book on [this artist] and the Pictorial Intelligence.
examples: Svetlana Alpers and Michael Baxandall collaborated on that book on [this artist] and the Pictorial Intelligence.

clues.clue: This artist reimagined prints by Giovanni Castiglione  and Salvator Rosa in a series of Capricci  and Scherzi .
examples: This artist reimagined prints by Giovanni Castiglione  and Salvator Rosa in a series of Capricci  and Scherzi .

clues.clue: This artist depicted the pillars of Hercules at the edge of an oval fresco whose central figureis being (*) crowned by a swooping angel in a fresco at the Royal Palace of Madrid.
examples: This artist depicted the pillars of Hercules at the edge of an oval fresco whose central figureis being (*) crowned by a swooping angel in a fresco at the Royal Palace of Madrid.

clues.clue: A woman with a feathered headdress rides a crocodile in a personification of America by this artist of Apotheosis of the Spanish Monarchy.
examples: A woman with a feathered headdress rides a crocodile in a personification of America by this artist of Apotheosis of the Spanish Monarchy.

clues.clue: A ceiling fresco by this artist is gradually revealed by walking up the Treppenhaus , is titled Allegory of the Planets and Continents, and is housed in a building designed by Balthasar Neumann .
examples: A ceiling fresco by this artist is gradually revealed by walking up the Treppenhaus , is titled Allegory of the Planets and Continents, and is housed in a building designed by Balthasar Neumann .

clues.clue: This artist painted a skeletal dog looks towards the title seated figure in Death Giving an Audience, one of a set of ten capricci that also includes The Astrologer and the Young Soldier.
examples: This artist painted a skeletal dog looks towards the title seated figure in Death Giving an Audience, one of a set of ten capricci that also includes The Astrologer and the Young Soldier.
